Why It Matters

Your Staff Behave
Differently When
You Are Not Watching.

Most business owners discover service failures from Google reviews, complaint calls, or falling revenue. By then the damage is done.

Verify Lanka gives you eyes on the ground before it becomes a problem you cannot hide.

Hidden Sales Go Unreported

Your cashier closes a sale, pockets the cash, and marks it as a return. With a mystery shopper making real purchases, you get independent transaction records you can cross-reference.

Customers Leave and Never Come Back

Most unhappy customers say nothing. They just stop coming. A mystery shopper captures the exact moment service fails, before it costs you repeat business.

Your Best Branch Might Be Your Worst

High sales numbers can mask poor service. A branch hitting targets while alienating customers is a future problem. Audits show you what the numbers do not.

Compliance on Paper Only

Your team confirms the checklist is done. But is it actually done? Mystery visits verify that your brand standards, safety protocols, and service rules are followed in practice.

Train Based on Real Gaps

Instead of generic staff training, audit reports show you exactly which staff, which branch, and which scenario needs attention. Training becomes targeted and measurable.

Know Before Your Customers Tell the Internet

A bad Google review reaches hundreds. A mystery shopper report reaches only you. Catching service failures internally is always cheaper than managing public reputation damage.

What We Do

Audit Services Built for Sri Lankan Businesses

We send real people into your branches as paying customers. They observe, score, and report back. You find out what is actually happening on the ground.

01

Mystery Shopping Visits

Trained auditors visit your branches posing as regular customers, reporting on service quality, staff conduct, compliance, and environment.

02

Branch Experience Reports

Structured, scored reports covering wait time, staff greeting, product knowledge, and overall experience, delivered within 48 hours.

03

Monthly Retainer Audits

Ongoing monitoring across multiple locations with monthly insight reports. Track improvement over time and hold branches accountable.

04

Compliance Checks

Verify that your brand standards, service protocols, and regulatory requirements are being met consistently across all locations.

Industries We Serve
Banking & Finance Telecommunications Retail & Supermarkets Hotels & Hospitality Restaurants & Food Chains Healthcare Insurance

How It Works

Simple Process.
Precise Results.

A simple four steps. No long contracts. No complicated setup.

01

You Brief Us

Tell us what you want assessed, locations, service scenarios, compliance points. We design the audit framework around your business goals.

02

We Deploy Auditors

Our trained field team visits your locations as regular customers. No prior notice to staff. No staged interactions. Pure observation.

03

We Score & Document

Every visit is scored against your criteria with detailed observations and photo evidence captured on the ground in real time.

04

You Receive the Report

A structured report with scores, findings, and recommended actions in your inbox within 48 hours of the completed visit.

Coverage

Operating Across Sri Lanka

Ground teams active in Colombo and Kandy. Other regions covered on request.

Active

Colombo

Full coverage across Colombo city and the western province. Ideal for banks, telecoms, and retail chains with head office presence.

Active

Kandy

Central province coverage including Kandy city commercial district, supermarkets, hotels, and branch networks in the hill capital.

On Request

Other Regions

Galle, Negombo, and other cities available on request. Contact us to discuss multi-city audit programmes.
